items.title: Egor Demin has lost an estimated 31 assists tonight due to the fact he threw the ball to Wolf or Powell.

items.title: Egor Demin was solid and Nets got a strong first half from 2-way Chaney Johnson.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Egor Demin was solid and Nets got a strong first half from 2-way Chaney Johnson.

OTOH ... Danny Wolf parlayed his ~50 dribbles into zero points and 1 assist, Drake Powell was invisible, Mikel Brown struggled, and Ben Saraf was outplayed by an actual hobbit.
